defaultValue.value: Required pre-shift training for all Mangia staff working SEL Friday Lunch events. Covers client context, compliance requirements, pre-event workflow, buffet service, and wrap-up procedures. Must be completed before first shift.
Mangia is SEL's only catering vendor on Friday Lunch events.
False. Mangia is not SEL's only Friday Lunch vendor.
Staff need to understand we earn our spot.
What is SEL's primary reason for choosing Mangia over other vendors?
We are the closest to campus
We have the most staff available
SEL chooses Mangia for professionalism, quality, and consistency.
This is the service standard every SEL shift must reinforce.
Your WA State Food Worker Card must be current...
Within 30 days of your first shift
By the end of your first month
Your WA State Food Worker Card must be current before your first shift.
No current card means you are not shift-ready.
Where do you pick up your SEL visitor badge?
The BOH Lead brings it to you
Pick up the badge at Building One security desk.
Arriving at the right check-in point prevents delays.
Where must your visitor badge be worn at all times on SEL campus?
Above the waistline, visible at all times
Wear the badge above the waistline and keep it visible.
Campus badge rules are mandatory, not optional.
Put the pre-event steps in the correct order:
Badge → Clock in → Arrive → Meet crew
Arrive → Clock in → Badge → Meet crew
Arrive → Badge → Clock in → Meet crew
Clock in → Arrive → Badge → Meet crew
The correct order is Arrive → Clock in → Badge → Meet crew.
The sequence matters for timekeeping, access, and crew readiness.
When do you clock in on Nowsta?
After you pick up your badge
At your scheduled start time when you arrive on site
Clock in at your scheduled start time when you arrive on site.
Nowsta timekeeping starts when you are on site and ready to work.
During buffet service, which portion do Mangia staff always serve?
Whatever the BOH Lead decides on the day
Mangia staff always serve the protein during buffet service.
Serving responsibilities need to stay consistent across lines.
What is the typical staffing configuration per buffet line?
A typical line uses 2 Servers and 1 Runner.
Knowing the standard line build helps staff slot in quickly.
Which of the following is the correct final checkout sequence?
Clock out → Return badge → Sign out → Check in with BOH Lead
Check in with BOH Lead → Sign out of staff sheet → Return SEL badge → Clock out of Nowsta
Return badge → Clock out → Sign out → Check in with BOH Lead
Sign out → Return badge → Check in with BOH Lead → Clock out
The correct sequence is Check in with BOH Lead → Sign out → Return badge → Clock out.
The checkout order closes accountability and campus access correctly.
